name: platform-engineering
description: Platform-engineering (internal developer platform) team — 3 agents (platform-architect, developer-portal-engineer, golden-paths-and-adoption-engineer) for the paved-road layer above CI/CD, Kubernetes, IaC, and observability: platform-as-product and Team Topologies (thinnest viable platform; stream-aligned / platform / enabling teams), the developer portal and software catalog (Backstage / Port / Cortex, catalog ownership, scaffolder templates, TechDocs, scorecards), self-service golden paths and guardrails-as-defaults (Terraform modules / Crossplane / Score + policy-as-code), and adoption measured as a product (DORA + DevEx, platform SLOs, paved-road coverage). Decision-tree knowledge bank, 12 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios, runnable DORA/paved-road/error-budget calculator. Seams: pipelines -> devops-cicd; clusters -> cloud-native-kubernetes; modules -> terraform-iac; SLOs -> observability-sre. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
